packageRules.description: All cargo deps update weekly, never auto-merge.

Fleet crates (SecurityRonin/h4x0r) — widen the requirement (rangeStrategy=bump un-sticks a caret pin that cannot reach a published next-minor) and group into one PR. This is a published-LIBRARY repo, so do NOT automerge: auto-bumping a library's own deps can silently raise its MSRV (see CLAUDE.md). Human-reviewed.
